tools.name: check_ai_readiness
tools.description: Check whether a website is visible to AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews). Scores AI-crawler access, JSON-LD structured data, title/meta, Open Graph, sitemap, and llms.txt, and returns a 0-100 score, a letter grade, and a specific fix for each gap. Free.

tools.name: generate_complete_fix_pack
tools.description: PAID. Returns the complete, ready-to-paste AI-readiness Fix Pack for a site: tailored Organization + FAQPage JSON-LD, an AI-crawler robots.txt, a sitemap, and title/meta/Open Graph fixes. Requires a `license` — the checkout-session id you receive after buying the $39 Fix Pack at https://buy.stripe.c
